text.title: ssh-hardening Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ssh-hardening as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting AllowUsers in multiple drop-in files. The last file alphabetically wins, silently excluding users set in earlier files.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Consolidate AllowUsers into a single drop-in file to avoid invisible user lockout.
